_note: Migrated from the legacy membership page content. Public UI must serve all forms locally and must not link to the legacy domain.

types.title: Standard Member
types.subtitle: Applied Technology Member
types.description: For practicing specialists, nurses, medical assistants, spa owners, and individuals who want to participate in seminars, workshops, and access KBIT training materials.

types.title: Professional Member
types.subtitle: Professional Academic Member
types.description: For doctors and qualified experts seeking in-depth academic knowledge, protocol development, technology transfer, and networking opportunities.

types.title: Strategic Partner
types.subtitle: Institutional Partner
types.description: For clinics, academies, businesses, and organizations wishing to co-develop workshops, training systems, demonstrations, and specialized solutions with KBIT.

groups.title: Standard Member Benefits
items: Invited to two annual high-level KBIT seminars in Vietnam.
Receive one complimentary ticket to an international KBIT conference in South Korea or a neighboring country.
Discounts and priority registration for selected advanced training programs.
Observe advanced treatment demonstrations such as Skinbooster, RF, and Laser under allowed practice scope.
Receive an official KBIT membership certificate and basic KBIT treatment SOP guidance.
May be featured through official KBIT communication channels after notable achievements.

groups.title: Professional Member Benefits
items: Priority registration and scholarship consideration for advanced KBIT training in Korea, Vietnam, and Southeast Asia.
Participate in advanced technology transfer including Skinbooster, RF, Meso, Botox, and Laser.
Access SOPs, clinical videos, training slides, and case-study resources.
Join a professional consultation group with Korean and Vietnamese doctors.
Opportunity to be nominated as lecturer, speaker, trainer, regional agent, or academic partner.
Use the title Professional Member - KBIT in professional materials.

groups.title: Strategic Partner Benefits
items: Co-organize in-depth workshops and seminars with KBIT in Vietnam and internationally.
Receive official Strategic Partner of KBIT recognition and certificate.
Use standardized KBIT academic materials for internal training.
Receive 1:1 strategic consulting on clinic models, branding, and long-term development.
Priority participation in exclusive treatment model development with the KBIT medical team.
Potential exclusive rights to distribute KBIT-certified products, programs, or high-tech aesthetic models in a representative area.

general.title: General Requirements for All KBIT Members
general.intro: Applicants must support KBIT's professional standards and meet the following conditions before approval.

items.title: Alignment with KBIT values
points: Commitment to professional development in aesthetic and high-tech medical fields.
Willingness to participate in KBIT training, seminars, and academic networking.

items.title: Clear academic and professional profile
points: Priority for experienced doctors, experts, clinic owners, and aesthetic professionals.
Standard members may apply without deep expertise, but must show commitment to capacity development.

items.title: Acceptance of membership terms
points: Follow KBIT's code of ethics, internal regulations, and professional standards.
Do not use the KBIT brand for misleading advertising or unauthorized commercial purposes.

items.title: Complete registration and fee payment
points: Submit the KBIT Membership Registration Form.
Provide a professional profile and relevant documents when applicable.
Transfer the membership fee to the official KBIT account after approval.

specific.name: Standard Member
points: Suitable for individuals working in or oriented toward the aesthetics industry.
Commitment to participate in at least one KBIT event or workshop per year.
Submit an application with the reason for joining the academic community.

specific.name: Professional Member
points: Requires a professional certificate in medicine, dermatology, aesthetics, or related fields.
Experience in practical work or research related to beauty technology.
Subject to KBIT review before official approval.

specific.name: Strategic Partner
points: Clinic, academy, business, or institute with capacity for in-depth cooperation.
Suitable facilities, people, or resources to support professional activities and seminars.
Evaluation process and formal cooperation agreement are required.

steps: Send a registration request to KBIT.
Complete the relevant local registration form.
Submit a professional profile and reason for joining.
Confirm approval and transfer membership fee as instructed.

tiers.name: Standard Member
tiers.audience: Aesthetic professionals, spa owners, and individuals beginning development within the KBIT ecosystem.
notes: Professional upgrade is not automatic due to different target groups.
Can register new or switch directly to Strategic Partner.

tiers.name: Professional Member
tiers.audience: Doctors and experts with qualifications in medical, aesthetic, or high-tech fields.
lifeBenefits: Lifetime free access to all workshops in Vietnam.
Priority for one medical tour to South Korea each year.
Two complimentary advanced technology training courses.
Lifetime Member plaque and honorary listing.

tiers.name: Strategic Partner
tiers.audience: Clinics, academies, businesses, or individuals able to implement strategic cooperation with KBIT.
lifeBenefits: Lifetime free access to exclusive SOP materials.
One complimentary advanced staff training course each year.
Two complimentary strategic technology training courses.
Priority rights to distribute new products or programs.

limitPolicy.title: Lifetime Package Limitation Policy
limitPolicy.note: Life Member applications require an interview to confirm eligibility before approval.

registrationForms.title: Download Membership Registration Forms
registrationForms.description: Select the registration form corresponding to your membership category. After completing it, submit the file and supporting documents through the KBIT contact channel.
